title: basananthe scabrifolia
intro: Basananthe scabrifolia, also known as the African spurge, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its green, smooth leaves and yellow flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Basananthe scabrifolia include the treatment of fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions or decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
